data.text: The repo already contains some ddx-12cae4dd-shaped changes in this worktree, so I‚Äôm checking whether they are complete or only partial before touching anything. The key points now are the scanner skip logic, GraphQL resolver tolerance, and whether the existing e2e test actually exercises the route contract.

The backend implementation and tests appear to have been restored in this attempt, including relative paths and resolver fallback. I‚Äôm now checking schema naming and the worktree diff so I can catch any remaining mismatch with the acceptance text before running verification.

"""List all library documents with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/documents)"""
  documents(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by document type (e.g. "prompt", "template")"""
    type: String
  ): DocumentConnection!

  """Read a single document by path (maps to GET /api/documents/{path...})"""
  documentByPath(
    """Document path relative to the library root"""
    path: String!
  ): Document

  """Return the full document dependency graph (maps to GET /api/docs/graph)"""
  docGraph: DocGraph!

  """Return only the structured integrity issues for the document graph."""
  docGraphIssues: [GraphIssue!]!

  """Return documents that are stale (maps to GET /api/docs/stale)"""
  docStale: [StaleReason!]!

  """Return the dependency IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/deps)"""
  docDeps(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!
  ): [String!]!

  """Return the dependent IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/dependents)"""
  docDependents(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!
  ): [String!]!

  """Return the git history for a document with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/history)"""
  docHistory(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): CommitConnection!

  """Return the diff for a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/diff)"""
  docDiff(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!,
    """Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)"""
    ref: String
  ): String!

  """Fetch a single document by ID (maps to GET /api/docs/{id})"""
  doc(
    """Document identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): Document

  """Search library documents (maps to GET /api/search)"""
  search(
    """Search query string"""
    query: String!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): SearchResultConnection!
